description_long: This is a modern, rectangular desk constructed from dark wood or wood laminate, featuring a smooth, flat tabletop with a subtle wood grain pattern. The front side includes two shallow drawers with round handles, providing storage for small items. At the back of the desk, there is an integrated raised panel that acts as a privacy or divider screen, with two open cubby shelves for organizing documents or supplies. The desk has straight, sturdy side panels and a solid back panel, giving it a robust and stable appearance. The overall design is functional and minimalistic, suitable for both professional and home environments. The finish is clean and even, with no visible signs of wear or damage.
description: A dark wood desk with two front drawers, a raised privacy panel, and open cubby shelves at the back. The design is modern, sturdy, and functional.
description_view_0: Front view showing two drawers with round handles and the raised privacy panel behind the tabletop.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the desk, the thickness of the panels, and the open cubby shelves behind the privacy panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid back panel and the full height of the privacy/divider screen.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the same features as the left, including the open cubby shelves and the desk's overall depth.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the one with the drawers and handles, while the raised privacy panel and cubby shelves are at the back. The solid side panels define the left and right sides.
